title: Kanazawa, Ishikawa — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Kanazawa, Ishikawa: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Kanazawa is a city in Ishikawa with a population of 465,000. A beautifully preserved samurai and geisha district city, with Kenrokuen Garden, one of Japan’s three great gardens.

Last updated: July 13, 2026
